options.name: -name
options.description: user-defined identifier for this clock tree

options.name: -no_skew_group
options.description: do not define any default skew group for the clock

options.name: -source
options.description: source pin for the clock tree ((instTerm|term), required)

options.name: -stop_at_sdc_clock_roots
options.description: stop searching for parts of the clock tree through SDC clock roots
